steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The contrast word Unlike signals that Takeuchi Seihu's approach differed from Asai Chū's. The evidence sentence confirms that Takeuchi actually used traditional Japanese methods (color pigments on silk), establishing that he took a positive stance toward these approaches.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
Takeuchi ______ traditional Japanese approaches — the evidence is that he actually used them (color pigments on silk), so the blank must mean adopted or accepted them positively. Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — distrusted: regarded with suspicion — the opposite of what using traditional methods shows. ✗
  • Choice B — overlooked: ignored or failed to notice — he didn't ignore them, he actively used them. ✗
  • Choice C — embraced: wholeheartedly adopted and valued — applying color pigments to silk is exactly what using traditional Japanese approaches looks like. ✓
  • Choice D — released: let go of or published — makes no sense in the context of an artistic approach. ✗
That is the correct answer.
